reviews.comment:
Los plateros en temporada, se ve que están fastidiosos o sobrepasados y suelen no dar buena atención. Y a veces falta combustible por la alta demanda...
Fuera de temporada nunca tuve problemas.

(Translated by Google)
The silversmiths during peak season seem overwhelmed or stressed and often don't provide good service. And sometimes there's a fuel shortage due to high demand... I never had any problems outside of peak season.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/13749144040617922376/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURtOVpEbm9BRRAB

reviews.comment:
MUCHA gente siempre en periodo vacacional, los baños me toco que no había papel,no es barato,pero en general atención con amabilidad.

(Translated by Google)
A LOT of people are always there during the holiday period, I had to find that there was no toilet paper in the bathrooms, it's not cheap, but in general the service was friendly.
